gates.title: Spec Compliance
gates.summary: Output matches requirements completely, without unjustified extra scope.

gates.title: Code Quality
gates.summary: Implementation is maintainable, testable and integration-safe.

gates.title: Test Evidence
gates.summary: Tests or checks were actually executed and relevant critical paths are covered.

gates.title: Security Review
gates.summary: Trust boundaries, permissions and data handling are reviewed.

gates.title: Tool Trust
gates.summary: Agent tool descriptions, schemas, outputs and permissions are bounded and clear.

gates.title: Context Budget
gates.summary: Working set remains focused and large raw outputs are summarized or indexed.

gates.title: Memory Policy Fit
gates.summary: Only durable decisions, preferences, lessons and stable constraints are stored.

gates.title: Stale Memory Check
gates.summary: Outdated or superseded memory is flagged before use.

gates.title: UI State Coverage
gates.summary: Loading, empty, error, success and permission states are covered.

gates.title: Responsive Check
gates.summary: Layout works across target viewports.

gates.title: Accessibility Baseline
gates.summary: Basic labels, keyboard path and readability are checked.

gates.title: API Contract Fit
gates.summary: Frontend, backend and integration consumers match the API contract.

gates.title: Data Integrity
gates.summary: Schema, constraints and data invariants protect correctness.

gates.title: Migration Safety
gates.summary: Database migrations are reversible or safely staged.

gates.title: Release Readiness
gates.summary: Release has evidence, known risks, deployment notes and owner handoff.

gates.title: Rollback Plan
gates.summary: Deployment has recovery notes or rollback strategy.

gates.title: Regression Coverage
gates.summary: Existing behavior affected by the change is covered.

gates.title: Electrical Safety
gates.summary: Electrical ratings, isolation and fault paths are reviewed.

gates.title: Timing
gates.summary: Timing, ISR, jitter and real-time assumptions are checked.

gates.title: Isolation
gates.summary: Power, signal and user-accessible isolation risks are reviewed.

gates.title: Fault Handling
gates.summary: Fault modes, watchdog behavior and safe states are defined.

gates.title: Bench Evidence
gates.summary: Physical/prototype work has measurement, log or test evidence.

gates.title: Interface Consistency
gates.summary: Hardware, firmware and mechanical interface assumptions match.

gates.title: Runtime Fit
gates.summary: Runtime resource, OS and deployment assumptions are compatible.

gates.title: Observability Baseline
gates.summary: Logs, metrics or traces exist for critical operation.

gates.title: Mobile Release Readiness
gates.summary: Mobile packaging, platform constraints and release notes are ready.

gates.title: Offline State Fit
gates.summary: Offline/poor connectivity behavior is defined where relevant.

gates.title: Grounding
gates.summary: LLM/RAG outputs are grounded in sources or explicit assumptions.

gates.title: Eval Coverage
gates.summary: Expected behavior and known failure modes are represented in evals.

gates.title: Prompt Safety
gates.summary: Prompt/tool interaction has safety and injection-resistance checks.

gates.title: Schema Clarity
gates.summary: Tool/input/output schemas are explicit and testable.

gates.title: Policy Fit
gates.summary: Guardrails match risk level without overblocking useful behavior.

gates.title: Role Clarity
gates.summary: Agent responsibilities and non-responsibilities are explicit.

gates.title: Handoff Integrity
gates.summary: Agent handoff inputs, outputs and next owner are explicit.

gates.title: Clarity
gates.summary: Request, output and constraints are understandable and testable.

gates.title: Scope Fit
gates.summary: Plan stays inside intended scope.

gates.title: Architecture Coherence
gates.summary: Modules, interfaces and constraints form a coherent system.

gates.title: Decision Traceability
gates.summary: Important decisions have reasons, alternatives and consequences.

gates.title: Plan Executability
gates.summary: Plan is concrete enough to execute without guessing.

gates.title: Sequence Integrity
gates.summary: Tasks are ordered according to dependencies and risk.

gates.title: Permission Model
gates.summary: Actions and tools operate with minimum needed permissions.

gates.title: Traceability
gates.summary: Outputs link back to inputs, decisions and sources.

gates.title: Source Freshness
gates.summary: Current topics use current sources and stale sources are flagged.

gates.title: Source Quality
gates.summary: Claims are supported by credible, traceable sources.

gates.title: Risk Clarity
gates.summary: Risks, assumptions and uncertainty are explicitly separated.

gates.title: Spec Completeness
gates.summary: Vendor/engineering spec has all must-have fields.

gates.title: Physics Consistency
gates.summary: Engineering output does not violate basic physical constraints.

gates.title: Vendor Clarity
gates.summary: Supplier-facing request is specific, measurable and answerable.

gates.title: Thermodynamics
gates.summary: Thermal/energy assumptions are directionally consistent.

gates.title: Capacity Fit
gates.summary: Component/system capacity matches target load.

gates.title: Plausibility
gates.summary: Claims and outputs pass a sanity check before detail work.
